title: Hinduja Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hinduja Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Hinduja Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Hinduja Healthcare:
Hinduja Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare!
